summary: User reported End Icon still shows as Reaction in running app. Verified XAML has Header=End Icon and no Reaction text in any .xaml file. The issue is the app was still running from an old build. Rebuilt the WPF project successfully (0 errors). User needs to restart the app to see the change.
current_status: Code is correct - End Icon is in the XAML. App needs a restart to pick up the new build.
